title: Implement graph/config planning core for Pi orchestration
description: Implement the runner core that reads .tick/config.md fresh, resolves optional Pi Orchestrator model/concurrency settings, runs Environment preflight checks, calls tk graph <epic> --json, detects needs_planning/missing_process_ticks, and computes ready waves plus tier/model assignments for dry-run output. The core should not launch agents or mutate code branches yet.
notes:
2026-07-13 09:41 - Smoke test ixv validated current graph/config dry-run core via Pi RPC. Fixed RPC command-output visibility and dynamic epic widget in discovered tick c9q. Full 7ts acceptance still needs unit tests and skeleton/preflight coverage.
2026-07-13 10:18 - runner-state: runner=pi branch=tick/qfs/7ts worktree=/Users/peterengelbrecht/Development/.ticks-worktrees/7ts base=a80357aaf86c615768bd16d5bd0c897ce4116687 model=openai-codex/gpt-5.6-sol:medium
acceptance_criteria: /ticks-run <epic> --dry-run shows waves, ready ticks, max_parallel cap, tier/model routing, and skeleton/preflight warnings. Unit tests cover config resolution, graph parsing, and missing skeleton handling.
